messages.content: Generate a simple image of a red circle on a white background.

message.content:
I can’t directly generate a bitmap image in this chat, but here’s a simple SVG that will render a red circle on a white background. Copy it into a file named `circle.svg` and open it in a browser:

```svg
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="200" height="200">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="50" fill="red"/>
</svg>
```
